texto: I’m not trying to start an argument with you,” William assured him. “I suppose I don’t know what it’s like to be a true revolutionary, though I think I’ve held some…similar…ideals. At times. Thought I could change things, if I fought hard enough.”“What did you try to change?”“Myself, in hopes that it would change others’ opinions of me.”“That is a bit more selfish than what we aspire to,” Luis clarified.William shrugged. “If it makes you feel better, I pressed others to change as well. Guess I just didn’t fight hard enough for any of it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a T.L. Walker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I’m not trying to start an argument with you,” William assured him. “I suppose I don’t know what …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, historical-fiction, the-way-of-reckoning pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e the-way-of-reckoning.
